title: nf-core/nfpgcrdev pipeline - params.input schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.input

patient.errorMessage: Patient name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

status.errorMessage: Status parameter must be either '0' (Normal) or '1' (Tumor)

sample.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

vcf.errorMessage: FastQ file for reads 1 must be provided, cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz'

cna.errorMessage: FastQ file for reads 2 cannot contain spaces and must have extension '.fq.gz' or '.fastq.gz'
